title: Smartbones 8 Mini Chicken Bones Rawhide Free Chew Dog Treats
features: An irresistible snack between meals; Chewing helps keep teeth healthy
Chewing fun with vegetables in the outer layer and chicken inside -free from rawhide
description: From the manufacturer Chewy Bones With Delicious Chicken SmartBones are the tempting non-rawhide chews that dogs can’t resist! Our 100% non-rawhide and wheat-free ingredients make SmartBones not only low in fat but easy to digest. Helping to keep your dog healthy and their tails wagging for more! These chews are also vitamin and mineral enriched to ensure that the soft texture of our treats is gentler on gums and tums. The chew bones with chicken are available in the following sizes: Mini (8 pieces / 18 pieces) Medium (2 pieces) Large (1 piece) Easily Digestable Our 100% delicious chews are easily digestible as they are made with no rawhide. Extra Low In Fat With irresistibly tasty chicken and vegetables - these scrumptious chews are extra low in fat Promotes Healthy Teeth & Gums SmartBones chews help satisfy a dog’s natural chewing instinct - which promotes healthy teeth and gums No artificial additives Free from artificial colours, flavours and preservatives Discover more delicious SmartBones products: Chicken Chew Bones Add To Basket Beef Chew Bones Add To Basket Sweet Potato Chew Bones Add To Basket Chicken Sticks Add To Basket Grill Masters Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,640 4.6 out of 5 stars 626 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,640 4.6 out of 5 stars 929 4.3 out of 5 stars 589 Price £5.45 £ 5 . 45 £5.30 £ 5 . 30 £4.80 £ 4 . 80 £6.50 £ 6 . 50 — Variants Mini, Medium, Large Mini, Medium Mini, Medium Chicken Sticks, Wrapped Sticks Chicken, Beef, Pork, Lamb Flavours Chicken with Vegetables Chicken with Beef Flavour Sweet Potato with Vegetables Chicken with Vegetables Barbecue Flavour Low Fat ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ No Rawhide ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Vitamin & Mineral Enriched ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
